message:
✨ Add card_type to GA4 card interaction events via CardTypeContext (#2053)

Adds a CardTypeContext in CardWrapper so shared UI components
(CardControls, CardSearchInput, CardClusterFilter) can identify
which card the user interacted with. All 5 card interaction
events now include card_type + page_path for full attribution.

GA4 events now report: card_type (e.g. "warning_events"),
page_path (e.g. "/insights"), sort_field/direction/limit, etc.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
